backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the sleep tracking backend, managing blink rate measurements, vibration events, rolling averages, sleep recommendations, and user profiles with role-based access control via a mixin authorization pattern.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three high-confidence features: a BLE pipe-delimited string parser in bleNus.ts, integration of that parser into BluetoothContext.tsx, and a live battery display in BatteryIndicator.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's role, covering pages, components, hooks, contexts, and configuration files in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to the sleep schedule app description and mounting the React root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Dashboard, DeviceConnection, DeviceDataIngestion, and SmokeTest, all wrapped in BluetoothProvider.
frontend/src/components/actor/ActorBoots: Deprecated wrapper component that previously initialized the ICP actor; now a no-op passthrough since the app is fully local-first.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Landing page shown to unauthenticated users featuring branding, a hero image, feature highlights, and an Internet Identity login button.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button that uses Internet Identity for authentication, clears the React Query cache on logout, and handles already-authenticated edge cases.
frontend/src/components/charts/BlinkRate: Renders a canvas-based blink rate history chart and an optional real-time light level chart, with a 3-second loading state and custom drawChart helper.
frontend/src/components/device/Actuation: Displays a card showing the eye-closed-to-vibration actuation latency in milliseconds, sourced from BluetoothContext.
frontend/src/components/device/BatteryIn: Shows a battery status card with percentage, progress bar, charging badge, and color-coded icons based on battery level from BluetoothContext.
frontend/src/components/device/DeviceSel: Renders a card with an input for entering an ESP32-C3 device ID and a link to the device management page.
frontend/src/components/docs/ApiExamples: Displays tabbed JavaScript and cURL code examples for recording blink rates, vibration events, and querying blink data, with copy-to-clipboard functionality.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppHeader: Sticky top navigation header with the Eye-R logo and links to Dashboard, Devices, API Docs, and Smoke Test routes.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Root layout component that wraps all pages with AppHeader, a main content outlet, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileS: Deprecated, always-hidden dialog for profile setup that is kept for compatibility but performs no actions in local-first mode.
frontend/src/components/recommendation/S: Card that displays the current live alertness state derived from a 5-minute rolling blink average and allows generating a personalized sleep schedule recommendation.
frontend/src/components/time/TimeRangePi: Card with a select dropdown for choosing a time range (6h, 24h, 7d, 30d) and a helper that converts the selection to nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/contexts/BluetoothContext.t: React context provider that manages BLE device connection, parses NUS notifications for blink rate, eye state, battery, and actuation latency, and exposes connection controls and callbacks to the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorBootstrap.ts: Deprecated stub hook that previously handled actor initialization; now a no-op returning static false states since the app is local-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useBleWriteQueue.ts: Deprecated stub hook that previously queued BLE writes to the backend; now a no-op returning empty queue state.
Deprecated stub hook that previously flushed blink summaries to the backend; now a no-op since persistence is handled locally via localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the ICP backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeviceId.ts: Hook that reads and persists a device ID string to localStorage, exposing a setter and a validity flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useEyeRBluetooth.ts: Hook that manages a BLE connection to an EyeR device, parses NUS notifications for blink rate and battery data, and exposes connection state and controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Hook and provider that wrap DFINITY's AuthClient to manage Internet Identity login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
Hook that maintains a capped array of blink rate data points in React state and persists them to localStorage, with add and clear operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for reading and writing blink rates, vibration events, blink summaries, user profiles, and actuation latency via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRollingBlinkRateAv: Hook that maintains a rolling 5-minute window of blink rate data points and computes their average, with add and clear operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionBlinkRateHi: React hook that maintains an in-memory rolling history of blink rate data points (capped at 100), with methods to add new points and clear the history.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines a calm, sleep-focused CSS custom property palette for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that integrates Bluetooth blink rate and light level data, displays charts and rolling averages, and allows users to generate a personalized sleep schedule recommendation.
frontend/src/pages/DeviceConnection.tsx: Page for managing Bluetooth device connection to Eye-R smart glasses, displaying connection status and live blink rate readings with optional custom UUID configuration.
frontend/src/pages/DeviceDataIngestion.t: Documentation page describing the API for submitting ESP32-C3 telemetry data (blink rate, timestamps) to the backend, including field descriptions and API examples.
frontend/src/pages/SmokeTest.tsx: Diagnostic page that verifies frontend-to-backend canister connectivity by calling basic actor methods and displaying authentication and actor status.
frontend/src/types/bluetooth.d.ts: TypeScript type declarations for the Web Bluetooth API, covering GATT server, service, characteristic, descriptor interfaces, and navigator extension.
frontend/src/utils/bleNus.ts: Defines Nordic UART Service UUIDs, eye-state light level thresholds, and parsers for classifying eye state from sensor readings and decoding the ESP32 pipe-delimited BLE string format (BAT:|LAT:|VAL:).
frontend/src/utils/bleUuid.ts: Provides utility functions to normalize BLE UUIDs into Web Bluetooth-compatible types (16-bit hex strings to numbers, 128-bit strings unchanged) and format them for display.
frontend/src/utils/bleWriteQueue.ts: Implements a localStorage-backed queue for pending BLE blink rate write operations, with enqueue, dequeue, remove, and clear functions.
frontend/src/utils/localSleepSchedule.ts: Generates local sleep recommendations by analyzing the last 100 blink rate data points, classifying fatigue level, and adding time-of-day and variability-based advice.
frontend/src/utils/personalizedSleepSche: Derives an alertness state (high-alertness, normal, drowsy) from a rolling average BPM and returns a corresponding personalized schedule plan with actionable items.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and remove sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, font family, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations, using typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state, architectural notes, known issues, existing implemented features, and pending feature requests for the EyeR Sleep Monitor BLE dashboard app.
